acceptance_criteria.statement: Given required fields are present, the decision can be reviewed as a candidate record.

applies_to: Team Decision Log MVP candidate graph
assumptions: The product remains a specification-only pilot before code generation.

claims.statement: Recording options, rationale, and evidence should reduce team context loss around accepted decisions.

nodes.description: Defines the product boundary for a team decision log.

requirements.statement: The product must capture a decision with title, context, owner, status, rationale, considered options, and evidence references.

nodes.title: Team Decision Log Product

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given a decision is accepted, owner, rationale, and at least one evidence reference are present.

nodes.description: Defines the minimum structure of a decision record.

requirements.statement: An accepted decision record must include owner, rationale, evidence refs, and current status.

nodes.title: Decision Record

acceptance_criteria.statement: Given rationale is added, it can be linked to one or more evidence references.

nodes.description: Captures evidence and rationale that support a decision.

requirements.statement: The product must let users attach evidence refs and rationale to a decision.

nodes.title: Evidence And Rationale
